description: Static JSON API — all endpoints are plain GET requests, no auth required, CORS open. Data is updated with each dashboard release.

usage.cors: open — all origins allowed (GitHub Pages default)

endpoints.description: This manifest — all endpoints, schemas, usage notes
Global heavy vehicle fleet time series 2021–2030. EV bus/truck/AHV/H2/LCV stock and sales. Diesel fleet decline. Regional NA/EU breakdowns. Total fleet denominators (all powertrains, ACEA 2026).
TAM/SAM/SOM market sizing. 2030 segments with ARPU and vehicle counts. 2035 growth projections. SAM by geography. ARPU assumptions and benchmarks.
Greenbay ARR trajectory 2025–2030. Five scenarios: bear, bottoms-up deal model, TAM conservative (3%), base (5%), upside (7%). Anchored at 2026=$0.8M and 2027=$3M.
Gartner SPAs from Predicts 2026: Transportation (G00841141). Four strategic planning assumptions with time series and Greenbay relevance. AHV fleet baseline with confirmed operator data.
All 32 data sources. Categories: EV fleet, HDV trucks, total fleet, AHV, regulatory, SaaS benchmarks, Gartner. Each with URL, HTTP status, and usage notes.
Dashboard metadata: version, changelog, company info, API base URL.
OpenAPI 3.1 schema — full type definitions, field descriptions, operationIds for all endpoints

schema_notes.units_currency: USD millions unless field name specifies _k (thousands) or _pct (percent)
schema_notes.china_note: China figures use 30% accessibility multiplier throughout — reflects JV/partner route constraint, not full fleet
schema_notes.fleet_age_source: ACEA Vehicles on European Roads 2026 (FY2024 actuals) — eu_bus_avg_age_years=12.2, eu_truck_avg_age_years=14.0, eu_van_avg_age_years=12.9
schema_notes.ahv_scope: L4+ commercial deployment only — no safety driver in ODD. Excludes L2/L3 ADAS-capable vehicles.

openapi_note: OpenAPI 3.1 schema for AI agent autodiscovery. Compatible with GPT function calling, LangChain tool definitions, and Claude tool_use.
